Author: kako5555
Name: Retainer Price Drop
Description: Automatically undercut your retainers' market listings — one retainer at a time, or every eligible retainer at once with 'Drop Prices for All'. HQ-aware pricing, a configurable undercut amount and re-pricing cooldown, and it skips your own listings so you never undercut yourself.
Punchline: Undercut all your retainer market prices in one click
